name: GPIBResponse
title: GPIBResponse
syntax: GPIBResponse (long deviceDescriptor, char queryString[], char resultString[]);
description: This function is called when the query returns. Users must implement this function and receive the original query string, the result as a string and the device ID.

parameters.name: deviceDescriptor
parameters.description: The Device Descriptor of the device, that transmitted the response.

parameters.name: queryString
parameters.description: The data transmitted in the GPIBQuery or GPIBQueryEx call, respectively.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
